summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Invoice Builder React application completed successfully. Tested all navigation, CRUD operations, search/filter functionality, line item calculations, modal operations, and dark mode toggle. All core features working as expected with mock API integration.
passed_tests: Page load and initial navigation to /invoices
Navigation between all tabs (Invoices, Customers, Senders, New Invoice)
Invoices table display with mock data (4 invoices)
Search functionality for filtering invoices
Status filter dropdown operation
New Invoice form with pre-populated invoice number and due date
Line item addition and removal functionality
Real-time line item calculations (quantity × price = total)
Summary calculations (subtotal, tax, total)
Customer page display and navigation
Add Customer modal opening and form field functionality
Senders page display and navigation
Add Sender modal opening and form field functionality
View invoice navigation and content display
Edit invoice navigation and form pre-population
Delete invoice confirmation dialog
Dark mode toggle functionality
PDF download button availability
Responsive design and mobile navigation
Form validation and required field handling
Modal cancel/close functionality
